# Analysi REST API Reference

All endpoints require authentication and are scoped to a tenant.
Base path: `/v1/{tenant_id}/`

## Response Format (Sifnos Envelope)

Every response wraps data in: `{"data": <payload>, "meta": {"request_id": "...", ...}}`

- **Lists** include `total`, `limit`, `offset` in `meta`
- **Errors** return standard HTTP status codes with `{"detail": "..."}`
- **Async operations** return `202 Accepted` with a run ID (poll the status endpoint)

---

## Alerts

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts` | List Alerts |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts` | Create Alert |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/batch-convert` | Batch convert alerts between formats |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/by-entity/{entity_value}` | Get Alerts By Entity |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/by-ioc/{ioc_value}` | Get Alerts By Ioc |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/convert` | Convert alert between formats |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/search` | Search Alerts |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}` | Get Alert |
| PATCH | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}` | Update Alert |
| DELETE | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}` | Delete Alert |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/analyses` | Get Alert Analyses |
| PUT | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/analysis-status` | Update Alert Analysis Status |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/analysis/cancel` | Cancel Alert Analysis |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/analysis/progress` | Get Analysis Progress |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/analyze` | Start Alert Analysis |
| PUT | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analyses/{analysis_id}/complete` | Complete Analysis |
| PUT | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analyses/{analysis_id}/status` | Update Analysis Status |
| PUT | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analyses/{analysis_id}/step` | Update Analysis Step |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/dispositions` | List Dispositions |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/dispositions/by-category` | Get Dispositions By Category |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/dispositions/{disposition_id}` | Get Disposition |

## Alert Routing & Analysis Groups

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alert-routing-rules` | List Alert Routing Rules |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alert-routing-rules` | Create Alert Routing Rule |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alert-routing-rules/{rule_id}` | Get Alert Routing Rule |
| DELETE | `/v1/{tenant_id}/alert-routing-rules/{rule_id}` | Delete Alert Routing Rule |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups` | List Analysis Groups |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups` | Create Analysis Group |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups/active-workflow` | Get Active Workflow By Title |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups/with-workflow-generation` | Create Group With Generation |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups/{group_id}` | Get Analysis Group |
| DELETE | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups/{group_id}` | Delete Analysis Group |
| POST | `/v1/{tenant_id}/analysis-groups/{group_id}/resume-paused-alerts` | Resume Paused Alerts |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/workflow-generations` | List Workflow Generations |
| GET | `/v1/{tenant_id}/workflow-generations/{generation_id}` | Get Workflow Generation |
| DELETE | `/v1/{tenant_id}/workflow-generations/{generation_id}` | Delete Workflow Generation |
| PATCH | `/v1/{tenant_id}/workflow-generations/{generation_id}/progress` | Update Workflow Generation Progress |
| PUT | `/v1/{tenant_id}/workflow-generations/{generation_id}/results` | Update Workflow Generation Results |
